query: SELECT eg.id, eg.name, eg.classId, t.name as topicName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jigsawExpertMembers WHERE expertGroupId = eg.id) as memberCount FROM jigsawExpertGroups eg LEFT JOIN jigsawTopics t ON eg.topicId = t.id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3C9YCXxCojabUDk.eefe8f8e8b67 --database FUZ2ecmXaKXVi9q85vHrsr --execute SELECT eg.id, eg.name, eg.classId, t.name as topicName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jigsawExpertMembers WHERE expertGroupId = eg.id) as memberCount FROM jigsawExpertGroups eg LEFT JOIN jigsawTopics t ON eg.topicId = t.id LIMIT 10;
